title: micropolypodium perpusillum
intro: Micropolypodium perpusillum, also known as Chinese Winter Clover or Winter Clover, is a type of plant in the lily family that is native to China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as acting as an antipyretic and analgesic. In herbal preparations, Micropolypodium perpusillum is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of teas, decoctions, and infusions to treat various ailments.
